reservation.title: RESERVATION?

reservation.warning: Reservations available for groups of 60+ guests, minimum pre-paid consumption of $10,000 MXN required.

shuttle.descMobileLine3: no hassle, just the fiesta waiting for you.
shuttle.description: Ride with the Güero Shuttle and arrive stress-free, no driving, no hassle, just the fiesta waiting for you.

footer.address: Carretera Internacional, Guadalajara–Tepic Highway Km 49 #4970, La Meza, 45380 Amatitán, Jalisco, Mexico
footer.hours: Open 365 days a year, 9:00 AM – 12:00 AM
footer.noFranchise: This is our one and only location.

about.sinceDescLine1: In Amatitán, at the heart of the Tequila

about.gueroDescLine2: atmosphere that brings people together, no

about.purposeDesc: To keep the authentic Jalisco fiesta alive and growing, creating experiences that bring people together, celebrate our traditions, and turn every visit into a shared memory that transcends generations and borders.

about.purposeDescDesktopLine3: turn every visit into a shared memory that transcends
about.soulLine1: We are the soul of Jalisco's fiesta.
about.soulGrowth: And since 1997, it hasn't stopped growing.

terms.title: Purchase and consumption terms and conditions
terms.legalBasis: (Under the Federal Consumer Protection Law and the General Health Law of Mexico)
terms.s1Text: To establish the clear terms and conditions under which the sale, delivery, and consumption of products at Cantaritos El Güero #1 are carried out, including alcoholic beverages and prepared food, in compliance with the Federal Consumer Protection Law (LFPC), the General Health Law (LGS), and applicable regulations.
terms.s2Bullet1: In accordance with Article 220 of the General Health Law, the sale or supply of alcoholic beverages and tobacco to persons under 18 years of age is strictly prohibited.
terms.s2Bullet2: Official identification (INE, passport, or driver's license) may be requested to verify legal age.
terms.s2Bullet3: Alcoholic beverages will not be served to minors under any circumstances, even if accompanied by adults.
terms.s3Bullet1: All product prices for alcoholic beverages and food are displayed in the establishment's menu and are expressed in Mexican Pesos (MXN), including applicable taxes (VAT).
terms.s3Bullet2: In accordance with Article 7 of the LFPC, displayed prices must match those charged at checkout.
terms.s3Bullet3: No minimum mandatory consumption is required, nor is access to the service conditioned upon the purchase of a specific item.
terms.s3Bullet4: Promotions, discounts, or "package deals" must clearly specify validity dates and conditions.
terms.s3Bullet5: Prices and promotions shown in menus or sales areas are the only valid ones. In case of discrepancy, the price visibly displayed to the public shall prevail.
terms.s4Bullet1: Customers must indicate the product, size, quantity, and specifications when placing their order.
terms.s4Bullet2: Orders are prepared once payment is processed.
terms.s4Sub1: The establishment reserves the right to refuse service.
terms.s4Sub2: Orders may not be modified once payment has been made.
terms.s4Bullet3: In the event of loss or damage to the receipt, the establishment may deny delivery, as the receipt serves as proof of purchase and required documentation for order pickup.
terms.s4Bullet4: Customers are responsible for keeping their receipt in good condition and presenting it at the pickup area.
terms.s5Sub1: Cash (MXN and USD, subject to exchange rate).
terms.s5Sub2: Credit and debit cards (national and international).
terms.s5Bullet2: In accordance with Article 7 Bis of the LFPC, customers will receive a receipt or proof of purchase for each transaction.
terms.s6Bullet1: All products are prepared and consumed exclusively within the establishment.
terms.s6Bullet2: Products are delivered only upon presentation of the corresponding pickup ticket and according to the instructions provided.
terms.s6Bullet3: It is strictly prohibited to remove alcoholic beverages in glass containers, in accordance with applicable Health Control Regulations for Alcoholic Beverages.
terms.s6Bullet4: Any damage to facilities, belongings, or acts related to excessive alcohol consumption are the sole responsibility of the customer, releasing Cantaritos El Güero #1 from liability.
terms.s6Bullet5: Alcohol consumption is the sole responsibility of the customer and should be done responsibly.
terms.s7Bullet1: Cancellations are accepted only before the product has been delivered.
terms.s7Bullet2: Customers must present their receipt (original and in good condition).
terms.s7Bullet3: If a product presents a defect (contamination, spill, or missing ingredient), it must be reported immediately.
terms.s7Bullet4: No exchanges or changes will be made for partially consumed products.
terms.s8Bullet1: No refunds are available for consumable products once delivered.
terms.s8Bullet2: If an item presents a defect attributable to the establishment, a replacement or compensation may be offered at the discretion of Cantaritos El Güero #1.
terms.s8Bullet3: Any claim must be made on the same day of purchase.
terms.s9Bullet1: Tips are completely voluntary, in accordance with PROFECO guidelines.
terms.s9Bullet2: No service charge or gratuity will be added without the customer's express consent.
terms.s10Bullet1: Invoices must be requested within the same calendar month as the purchase and require presentation of the original receipt.
terms.s10Bullet2: Customers are responsible for retaining their receipt and requesting their invoice through the official designated channels.
terms.s11Bullet1: In case of dispute, consumers may contact the Federal Consumer Protection Agency (PROFECO).
terms.s11Bullet2: PROFECO may verify that prices, promotions, and displayed conditions are clear, accurate, and not misleading.
terms.s11Bullet3: Cantaritos El Güero #1 guarantees respectful and dignified treatment of all individuals, without discrimination based on gender, sexual orientation, nationality, religion, social condition, or any other factor. Discriminatory conduct of any kind will not be tolerated.
terms.s12Bullet1: We reserve the right of admission in accordance with applicable law, particularly in cases of:
terms.s12Sub3: Pressure to sell or consume alcohol.
terms.s12Bullet2: Any consumption implies acceptance of these Terms and Conditions.
terms.s13Title: 13. "Hospedaje Aliado del Güero", "Ruta Aliada del Güero" Programs, and Informational Directory
terms.s13P1: Cantaritos El Güero #1 may feature on its official website a directory of tour operators, lodging providers, and other tourism-related service providers under the "Hospedaje Aliado del Güero" program.
terms.s13P2: The providers listed in the Directory are included solely for informational and referral purposes. Cantaritos El Güero #1 does not act as an intermediary, agent, representative, broker, partner, or service provider in connection with any services offered by the listed third parties. Accordingly, Cantaritos El Güero #1 does not arrange, facilitate, manage, confirm, or process reservations, bookings, payments, or agreements between consumers and any listed provider.
terms.s13P3: Any reservation, booking, or contractual relationship arising from services offered by a third party is entered into directly and exclusively between the consumer and the applicable provider, and is governed solely by that provider's own terms and conditions. The provider remains solely responsible to the consumer for the performance of its services in accordance with applicable law.
terms.s13P4: In compliance with the Mexican Federal Consumer Protection Law (Ley Federal de Protección al Consumidor), Cantaritos El Güero #1 provides clear notice that its role is limited to publishing and sharing information. It therefore assumes no direct, joint, vicarious, or secondary liability for the availability, quality, safety, performance, cancellations, changes, refunds, or any other matter arising before, during, or after services are rendered by third-party providers.
terms.s13P5: For the avoidance of doubt, this includes, without limitation, motor vehicle accidents during transportation, incidents occurring in the course of guided tours or excursions, injuries sustained on lodging premises, damage to personal property, or any other event arising out of or related to services operated by third parties.
terms.s13P6: By accessing or using the Directory, consumers acknowledge and agree that Cantaritos El Güero #1 operates strictly as an informational reference platform and does not assume any joint, several, or derivative liability in connection with services provided by third parties.
terms.disclaimer: THIS DOCUMENT IS AVAILABLE AT THE POINT OF SALE AND ON THE ESTABLISHMENT'S OFFICIAL WEBSITE.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: PRIVACY NOTICE
privacy.company: CANMEX CANTARITOS MEXICANOS RODRÍGUEZ GUTIÉRREZ, S. DE R.L. DE C.V. (HERE IN AFTER "CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1")
privacy.intro1: In accordance with and in compliance with the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties (the "Law"), CANMEX Cantaritos Mexicanos Rodríguez Gutiérrez S. de R.L. de C.V. is responsible for the use and protection of your personal data, and we are committed to safeguarding the confidentiality of the information you provide to us.
privacy.intro2: CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1, with address at Carretera Internacional Libre Guadalajara – Tepic, Kilometer 49, Number 4970, La Meza, 45380 Amatitán, Jalisco, is responsible for the processing of your personal data and hereby informs you of the following:
privacy.s1Title: PERSONAL DATA WE COLLECT AND USE ABOUT YOU
privacy.s1P1: To carry out the purposes described in this Privacy Notice, we will use identification, contact, employment, and financial personal data, such as: full name; age; gender; address; personal telephone number and email address; handwritten signature; current employment; telephone number and email address; and debit or credit card number or billing information.
privacy.s1P2: Likewise, if CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1 deems it necessary and applicable, we may collect, through the information you provide, certain personal data in general and employment-related data, as applicable, from third parties such as children, spouse, and other additional contacts you designate, as well as personal references for consultation and verification purposes by CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1 to ensure that the personal data you freely provide is correct and current. CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1 may also collect information about you from other sources.
privacy.s1P3: For the purposes informed in this Privacy Notice, we will only use sensitive personal data contained in your Official Identification, which will be used to verify your identity.
privacy.s2P1: If CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1 collects sensitive personal data —such as information related to your health condition, religious or ideological beliefs, ethnic or racial origin, or any other data that may affect your privacy— such data will be processed under strict security and confidentiality measures and only with your express written consent, in accordance with Article 9 of the Law.
privacy.s2P2: Refusal to allow the processing of such data will not be grounds for denying you the services or products you request.
privacy.s3Title: PURPOSES FOR WHICH WE WILL USE YOUR PERSONAL DATA
privacy.s3P1: The personal data we collect from you is intended to comply with the protection principles set forth in Article 5 of the Law: legality, purpose, loyalty, consent, quality, proportionality, information, and accountability in the processing of personal data. Accordingly, the personal data we collect will be used for the following purposes necessary for the service you request:
privacy.s3Subtitle: SALE OF ALCOHOLIC AND NON-ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES, PREPARED FOOD, COMPLEMENTS (SNACKS, CIGARETTES, ETC.), POTTERY, CATERING SERVICES AND ENTERTAINMENT:
privacy.s3Bullet1: Verification of your identity (cross-checking the accuracy of the information you provide with the National Electoral Institute in order to prevent identity theft).
privacy.s3Bullet3: Process, manage, and operate the services you request according to the specifications provided.
privacy.s3P2: Additionally, we will use your personal information for the following purposes that are not necessary for the requested service but allow us to provide better service and attention:
privacy.s3Extra1: For informational, promotional, advertising, and commercial purposes.
privacy.s3Extra2: To learn your opinion regarding the quality of our services and products.
privacy.s3Extra3: To ensure proper and adequate treatment.
privacy.s3P3: If you do not wish your personal data to be processed for these additional purposes, you may submit a written statement at this time expressing your refusal by sending your request to the following email address: atencion@cantaritoselguero.mx.
privacy.s3P4: Refusal to allow the use of your personal data for these additional purposes will not be grounds for denying you the services and products you request or contract with us.
privacy.s4Title: PURPOSES AND WITH WHOM WE SHARE YOUR INFORMATION
privacy.s4P1: In accordance with Articles 35 and 36 of the Law, we inform you that your personal data may be shared only in the specific case at hand, exclusively with one or more third parties, such as service providers selected to support promotional and marketing activities of our services, management and administration activities collected through the registration of your personal data via the website cantaritoselguero.mx or by any other means. CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1 will under no circumstances commercialize, sell, or rent your personal information to a third party without your prior consent.
privacy.s5Title: YOUR RIGHTS OF ACCESS, RECTIFICATION, CANCELLATION, AND OPPOSITION (ARCO RIGHTS) AND HOW TO REVOKE YOUR CONSENT
privacy.s5P1: In accordance with Chapter IV of the Law, you have the right to know what personal data we hold about you, what we use it for, and the conditions of use we give it (Access). You also have the right to request correction of your personal information if it is outdated, inaccurate, or incomplete (Rectification); to request its deletion from our records or databases when you consider it is not being used in accordance with applicable principles, duties, and obligations (Cancellation); and to object to the use of your personal data for specific purposes (Opposition). These are known as ARCO rights.
privacy.s5P2: To exercise any of the ARCO rights, you may submit your request electronically via email at atencion@cantaritoselguero.mx, or by telephone at +52 3741 0045 69.
privacy.s5P3: You must specify which personal and/or sensitive data you wish to have rectified, canceled, reviewed, or opposed in its use. Once identified, the following procedure must be followed:
privacy.s5P4: Submit your request for access, rectification, cancellation, or revocation through a written statement addressed to CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1 through the aforementioned means, including a clear and precise description of the personal data for which you seek to exercise an ARCO right, except in the case of the right of access.
privacy.s5P5: Attach a copy of your valid official identification (voter ID or passport).
privacy.s5P6: CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1 will respond within no more than 20 days from receipt of the request.
privacy.s5P7: If appropriate, CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1 will carry out the rectification, cancellation, revocation, or provide access within no more than 15 days following the response. If not appropriate, the request will be denied.
privacy.s6Title: REVOCATION OF CONSENT FOR THE USE OF YOUR PERSONAL DATA
privacy.s6P1: You may revoke the consent you have granted for the processing of your personal data. However, please note that in certain cases we may not be able to fulfill your request or immediately cease the use of your data due to legal obligations requiring continued processing.
privacy.s6P2: To revoke your consent, you must send a written request addressed to CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1 via email at atencion@cantaritoselguero.mx, including your full name, contact method for notifications, and the data for which you wish to revoke consent.
privacy.s6P3: Upon receipt of your request, CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1 will communicate the corresponding resolution within no more than 20 business days. If applicable, revocation will take effect within 15 business days following notification.
privacy.s7Title: USE OF TRACKING TECHNOLOGIES ON OUR WEBSITE
privacy.s7P1: We inform you that on our website https://cantaritoselguero.mx we use cookies, web beacons, and other technologies. For further reference, you may consult the "Website Terms and Conditions," through which we may monitor your behavior as an internet user, provide better service and user experience while browsing our website, and offer products and services based on your preferences.
privacy.s7P2: The personal data obtained through these tracking technologies includes: browsing schedule, time spent on our website, sections consulted, and websites accessed prior to ours.
privacy.s8Title: HOW TO LEARN ABOUT CHANGES TO THIS PRIVACY NOTICE
privacy.s8P1: This Privacy Notice may be modified due to new legal requirements, changes in our products or services, new privacy practices, or other causes. We reserve the right to amend this Privacy Notice at any time.
privacy.s8P2: CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1 undertakes to inform you of any changes by phone at +52 3741 0045 69, through our website https://cantaritoselguero.mx, or directly via the email address you have provided.
privacy.s9Title: LEGAL BASIS FOR THE PROCESSING OF PERSONAL DATA
privacy.s9P1: The processing of personal data collected by CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1 is carried out in accordance with Articles 6, 7, 8, 10, 15, 16, 17, 18, 21, 22, 23, 36, and other applicable provisions of the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties, its Regulations, and the Privacy Notice Guidelines.
privacy.s9P2: Processing is based on the principles of legality, consent, information, quality, purpose, loyalty, proportionality, and accountability, guaranteeing the protection and confidentiality of the personal data of our customers, suppliers, and visitors.
privacy.s10P1: The user acknowledges being informed of the conditions regarding the protection of personal data for the purposes established by the Law.
privacy.s10P2: The processing of your personal data in our possession will be carried out in accordance with these terms and conditions. In the absence of your express refusal, it is understood that you expressly authorize CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1 to process your personal information for such purposes until you express your opposition through any of the mechanisms provided by the Law. For any matter related to the processing of your personal information not addressed in this Comprehensive Privacy Notice, please contact CANTARITOS EL GÜERO #1 using the contact details previously provided.
privacy.s10P3: This Privacy Notice was last updated on October 31, 2025.
privacy.s11Title: NOTICE: RIGHT OF PUBLICITY - PHOTOGRAPHY & VIDEO
privacy.s11P1: Cantaritos El Güero #1 captures photos and videos of the venue's atmosphere for promotional purposes, including social media, website, and other in-house materials. By entering, you consent to the capture and use of your image in accordance with the applicable laws in Mexico, including the Ley Federal del Derecho de Autor and the Ley Federal de Protección de Datos Personales en Posesión de los Particulares.
privacy.s11P2: If you prefer not to be photographed, please inform our photographer or staff so you can be identified and excluded from shots. If you wish to request the removal of a published image, please email admin@cantaritoselguero.mx, including the link (URL), a description of the post, the date, and the corresponding social network.
privacy.s11P3: Your request will be handled promptly and free of charge.
privacy.s11P4: Thank you for helping us maintain a cheerful, respectful, and safe environment.
privacy.s11P5: Cantaritos El Güero #1 reserves the right to update this notice to reflect legal or operational changes. The current version will be available on our website and/or privacy notice.
